creator: bobf@mrp3.com
text:
Additional followup:

In order to test the concept completely (workaround) I restarted powerd (using hapd as before), the HPET event timer, and mwait idle method.

Played various videos (including the ones that displayed the problem in earlier repro tests) for about 1 hour, some of which should have been long enough to at least have problems with the audio.

Results:  no observed audio glitches, and in one case, video performance seemed to be better (no dropped frames in a specific portion of the video that was dropping frames in all of the previous tests).

Conclusion:  the best workaround seems to be to use the HPET event timer and the 'mwait' idle method, with no need to disable powerd.
